new.name: HTB-Pterodactyl-Writeup

new.name: HTB-Pterodactyl-Writeup
new.description: HackTheBox — Pterodactyl (Medium/Linux) walkthrough. CVE-2025-49132 LFI → pearcmd RCE → bcrypt crack → SSH. Privesc via CVE-2025-6018 (PAM pam_environment bypass) + CVE-2025-6019 (udisks2 XFS resize race condition, nosuid bypass) → root. Full notes and steps included.

new.name: Breaking-AWS-IAM-Privilege-Escalation-via-Mis-Evaluated-Policy-Conditions-CVE-2026-1238-
new.description: This research analyzes CVE‑2026‑1238, a flaw in AWS IAM where policy conditions are mis‑evaluated, enabling stealthy privilege escalation. It breaks down the root cause, real‑world impact, and practical mitigation steps to help teams secure their cloud environments.
